title: Wire RBAC middleware into main middleware chain
description: RBAC MVP is done (DB tables, ConfigStore CRUD, HTTP API, seed migration, middleware implemented). Need to wire RBAC middleware into the main middleware chain. Requires session auth integration to map X-BF-User-ID to actual user sessions.

title: Re-add lost providers via UI
description: Re-add lost providers (openrouter, ezif, dashscope, gemini, etc.) via UI. Providers were lost during config merge issues — now that WriteConfigToFile preserves existing providers, re-add them through the UI.
